# Vernon Steward

> Vernon Steward is a New York based senior operator and CEO of Prota Studios. 25 years building businesses, digital products, and revenue lines from zero.

## About

I help companies turn ambiguous opportunities into clear roadmaps, measurable tests, and repeatable commercial models, with 25 years building businesses, digital products, and revenue lines from zero.

I grew up in South Africa and Italy and have spent most of the last few decades in New York building products and launching new businesses: from an enterprise innovation lab to multi-million-dollar growth and build studios.

I work best at the front edge of new businesses: the part where the brief is half a page and the answer is somewhere out in the world. I run lean experiments, design operating models, and ship things alongside founders, product teams, and Fortune 500 executives.

Outside work I cook whatever is in the fridge, follow the long-suffering NY Knicks and AS Roma, and speak four languages with varying degrees of conviction.

## What I do

- **Validation**: Get the right market signals to make your next product and business decision informed and based on real customer data. Research, experiments, demand tests, AI-enabled workflows.
- **Growth Marketing**: Set up your multichannel marketing stack, or audit and optimize what you are running. Connect the data from the top of funnel ads to your backend CRM. Search, Social, S/GEO, Analytics, Content, Email.
- **Product Development**: Design, test, and develop new digital products at AI speed, from UI/UX design through high fidelity prototypes to shipped code, all with built in experiment loops and conversion optimization.

## Select projects

- **Citi Ventures**: Innovation partner for 9 years delivering 100+ product experiments and demand tests, developing new products and capabilities.
- **Wire Network**: Led a 12-week incubator program for an emerging blockchain, including content, communication, community, and demo day.
- **Audubon**: Created a high fidelity interactive prototype to visualize complex bird migration data, showcasing geospatial mapping, education and environment content.
- **Provuu**: Launched a time-constrained Kickstarter campaign for an AR snow goggle startup: 650% of goal, most successful category campaign ever.
- **Clorox**: Developed product innovations, ecommerce MVPs, and demand tests for brands including Glad, Kingsford, and Fresh Step.
- **Visa**: Ran an international new-product validation test comparing consumer product demand across the US and Asia.

## Current work

- CEO of Prota Studios (https://protastudios.com)
- Recently concluded running the Wire Network blockchain incubator (https://wire.network/incubator)
